  "findings": [
    "Missing supplemental grounding electrode as required by code when a metal underground water pipe is used as the primary grounding electrode."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install a supplemental grounding electrode, such as a rod, pipe, plate, or concrete-encased electrode, and bond it to the grounding electrode system."
  ],
  "rationale": "Under NEC 250.53(D)(2), a metal underground water pipe electrode must be supplemented by an additional electrode of a type specified in 250.52(A)(2) through (A)(8). The absence of this supplemental electrode constitutes a code violation.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 250.50",
    "NEC 250.52",
    "NEC 250.53(D)(2)"
  ]
}
